recommendations.title: The Looming Storm
recommendations.overview: Yu, a self-assured factory guard, fancies himself a detective and begins poking his nose into a murder investigation.

recommendations.title: The Traffic Policeman
recommendations.overview: An unemployed man gets a job as traffic policeman but the traffic in the big city creates innumerous problems for the poor guy.

recommendations.title: My Piece of the Pie
recommendations.overview: France, a factory worker, lives with her three daughters in Dunkirk. The factory where she worked has been closed, leaving France and all of her workmates without a job. She decides to go to Paris to look for work. There she finds a cleaning job at t

recommendations.title: Guava Island
recommendations.overview: Deni Maroon, a musician and dock worker is determined to pull off a music festival against the interests of the local factory owner.

recommendations.title: Nightmare Alley
recommendations.overview: A roustabout joins a traveling carny and schemes to figure out the mind-reading act of Mademoiselle Zeena and her alcoholic husband.

recommendations.title: Saturday Night and Sunday Morning
recommendations.overview: A 22-year-old factory worker lets loose on the weekends: drinking, brawling, and dating two women, one of whom is older and married.

recommendations.title: Secretary
recommendations.overview: A young woman, recently released from a mental hospital, gets a job as a secretary to a demanding lawyer, where their employer-employee relationship turns into a sexual, sadomasochistic one.

recommendations.title: The Italian Job
recommendations.overview: Charlie's got a 'job' to do. Having just left prison he finds one of his friends has attempted a high-risk job in Torino, Italy, right under the nose of the mafia. Charlie's friend doesn't get very far, so Charlie takes over the 'job'. Using three Mi

recommendations.title: She Hate Me
recommendations.overview: Fired from his job, a former executive turns to impregnating wealthy lesbians for profit.

recommendations.title: A Touch of Sin
